title: Get Weight Time Series by Date Range
description: Retrieves a list of all user's weight log entries for a given date range.

parameters.name: user-id
parameters.description: The encoded ID of the user. Use "-" (dash) for current logged-in user.

parameters.name: start-date
parameters.description: The start date specified in the format yyyy-MM-dd or today .

parameters.name: end-date
parameters.description: The end date specified in the format yyyy-MM-dd or today . Maximum range: 31 days

response_fields.name: weight : bmi
response_fields.description: Calculated BMI in the format X.XX.

response_fields.name: weight : date
response_fields.description: Log entry date in the format yyyy-MM-dd.

response_fields.name: weight : logId
response_fields.description: The weight log IDs. It's unique to the user, but not globally unique.

response_fields.name: weight : source
response_fields.description: The source of the weight log. See "source" values for more information. Support: API | Aria | AriaAir | Withings

response_fields.name: weight : time
response_fields.description: Time of the measurement; hours and minutes in the format HH:mm:ss, set to the last second of the day if not provided.

response_fields.name: weight : weight
response_fields.description: Weight in the format X.XX, in the unit system that corresponds to the Accept-Language header provided or if not provided in metric.
